title: Kresiah Mukwazhi and Thembinkosi Hlatshwayo
body: A two-person exhibition at blank projects bringing together new work by Kresiah Mukwazhi and Thembinkosi Hlatshwayo.

title: Misheck Masamvu: Naked
body: A solo exhibition of new paintings by Misheck Masamvu at Goodman Gallery Cape Town.

title: I Find You All Around Me
body: A group exhibition at THK Gallery in the city centre.

title: Portia Zvavahera: Tanda rima
body: A major exhibition by the Zimbabwean artist Portia Zvavahera at the Norval Foundation, presented as part of the Investec Cape Town Art Fair programme.

title: Githan Coopoo: Tears Now But Heaven Tomorrow
body: An exhibition at the Norval Foundation honouring the South African artist Githan Coopoo and his work with clay.

title: Brett Murray: Wild Life
body: A solo exhibition of more than eighty sculptures spanning four decades of Brett Murray's career, at the Norval Foundation.

title: Both, and
body: A group exhibition opening at Stevenson Cape Town, spilling beyond the main gallery into private and administrative spaces, with work by current gallery artists and guests. Opening Thursday 5 July, 6 to 8pm.

title: First Thursdays: Cape Town city centre
body: On the first Thursday of the month, galleries and cultural spaces across the city centre stay open into the evening. Walk between shows on foot through the City Bowl.

title: Where to start with Cape Town art this winter
body: A short Grounded Art guide to the shows worth a trip across the city right now, from the Woodstock galleries to the city centre and the Waterfront.

title: Studio spotlight: emerging Cape Town artist
body: Placeholder seed post for an emerging artist working without gallery representation, linking to their own digital presence. Replace with curated content. This item exists to exercise the location-less feed path.
